events.description: Spring Musical production of 'The Wizard of Oz' at Woodside High Auditorium. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission. Ticket prices: Adults $15, Students/Seniors $10, Children under 5 Free. Purchase online at woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
